summary: Completed comprehensive testing of StatisticsTab refactoring with sub-tabs and MultiCountryComparison component. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Redis disconnected - returns status=disconnected. Cache disabled but app gracefully degrades.

context_for_next_testing_agent: StatisticsTab refactoring and MultiCountryComparison fully tested. Key findings: (1) All 4 sub-tabs working: Vue d'ensemble, Produits, Tendances, Comparaison Pays. (2) MultiCountryComparison allows selecting up to 4 countries with color-coded badges. (3) Compare button triggers /api/ai/profile/{country} API calls. (4) Radar chart displays normalized indicators (PIB, Exportations, Importations, IDH, GAI, Commerce Intra-Africain). (5) Comparison tables show economic indicators, trade indicators, and development indices. (6) Redis cache is disconnected but app gracefully degrades.

working: GET /api/countries?lang=fr - Returns 55+ African countries with iso3, name fields

statistics_sub_tabs.details: All 4 sub-tabs present with data-testid: stats-overview-tab, stats-products-tab, stats-trends-tab, stats-comparison-tab

multi_country_comparison.details: Component renders with country selector, compare button, reset button. Supports up to 4 countries.

country_selector.details: Dropdown shows all African countries. Selector hides after 4 countries selected (MAX_COUNTRIES limit).

compare_button.details: Triggers API calls to /api/ai/profile/{country} for each selected country. Loading state shown during fetch.

radar_chart.details: Recharts RadarChart displays normalized indicators (0-100 scale) for PIB, Exportations, Importations, IDH, GAI, Commerce Intra-Africain

comparison_tables.details: Three tables displayed: Indicateurs Économiques (PIB, PIB/Habitant, Inflation, Chômage, Population), Indicateurs Commerciaux (Exportations, Importations, Balance, Commerce Intra-Africain), Indices de Développement (IDH Score/Rang, GAI Score/Rang)

bar_chart.details: Bar chart shows Exportations and Importations comparison between selected countries

ui_verification.statistics_tab: Working - Shows 4 sub-tabs with proper navigation
ui_verification.overview_subtab: Working - OEC Trade Stats, Zauba Style Stats, Top Exporters/Importers charts
ui_verification.products_subtab: Working - Top 20 Products table with Import/Export World and Intra-African tabs
ui_verification.trends_subtab: Working - Commerce Total Africain and Commerce INTRA-AFRICAIN sections
ui_verification.comparison_subtab: Working - MultiCountryComparison component with full functionality
ui_verification.country_badges: 4 color-coded badges (green, cyan, purple, red) with X remove buttons
ui_verification.radar_chart: Recharts RadarChart with 6 indicators and legend
ui_verification.bar_chart: Recharts BarChart comparing Exportations and Importations
ui_verification.data_source_footer: Sources: IMF WEO 2024, World Bank, UNDP, OEC with 'Données en direct' badge
